Jhumkas Across India

Explore the rich diversity of jhumka styles from different states of India, each with its unique cultural heritage.

Rajasthan

Known for vibrant colors and intricate meenakari work

Explore Rajasthan Collection

Gujarat

Features delicate filigree work and colorful beads

Explore Gujarat Collection

Tamil Nadu

Characterized by temple-inspired designs

Explore Tamil Nadu Collection

Karnataka

Famous for traditional Kasuti embroidery-inspired designs

Explore Karnataka Collection

West Bengal

Renowned for intricate filigree work and Dokra art

Explore West Bengal Collection

Kashmir

Celebrated for delicate enamel work and nature motifs

Explore Kashmir Collection

Kerala

Known for traditional temple jewelry designs

Explore Kerala Collection

Uttar Pradesh

Famous for Kundan and Polki work from Varanasi

Explore Uttar Pradesh Collection

Exquisite jhumkas for every occasion, crafted with love and tradition.
